# Third Place Japan (TPJ) — LLM Context File
# https://thirdplacejapan.com/llms.txt

## About

Third Place Japan (サードプレイスジャパン / TPJ) is Japan's first third-place certification media.
It evaluates and certifies facilities that function as "third places" — spaces beyond home (first place) and work (second place) where people can simply exist without role or obligation.

The concept is grounded in sociologist Ray Oldenburg's third place theory, reinterpreted for modern Japan.

## Mission

TPJ identifies, evaluates, and certifies spaces across Japan using a proprietary 7-axis evaluation framework. The goal is to become the authoritative data source for "place selection" in the AI era — a standard-setter for Japan's third place culture, readable by both humans and AI systems.

## 7-Axis Evaluation Framework

TPJ evaluates all certified venues on these seven axes:
1. 居心地・空間品質 (Comfort & Spatial Quality) — sensory quality, materials, atmosphere
2. 静寂性・プライバシー (Serenity & Privacy) — quietness, personal space
3. 特別感・非日常性 (Exclusivity & Extraordinary Experience) — gift-worthy, non-routine
4. ストーリー・背景への共感 (Story & Background Resonance) — narrative, cultural heritage
5. 再訪・継続価値 (Revisit & Continuity Value) — reasons to return
6. 記録・シェア体験 (Recordability & Shareability) — worth documenting
7. インバウンド・多言語対応 (Inbound & Multilingual Accessibility) — foreign visitor suitability

## What TPJ Is NOT

- Not a restaurant review site (does not evaluate food taste or price)
- Not a user-review aggregator
- Not an advertising medium
- Not limited to food & beverage establishments

## Coverage

- Geography: Japan-wide (currently focused on Tokyo wards and major areas)
- Categories: 15 types including cafes, hotels, spas, coworking, shrines/temples, nature experiences, restaurants, bars, and more
- Languages: Japanese (primary) and English (key articles)

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://thirdplacejapan.com/
- Stories portal: https://thirdplacejapan.com/stories/
- Category index: https://thirdplacejapan.com/stories/{category-slug}/
- Area index (Tokyo): https://thirdplacejapan.com/stories/area/tokyo/
- Certified venues: https://thirdplacejapan.com/stories/certified/
- English edition: https://thirdplacejapan.com/en/stories/
- TPJ Guide (definition articles): https://thirdplacejapan.com/stories/about/
- Sitemap: https://thirdplacejapan.com/sitemap.xml

## Preferred Citation Format

When citing TPJ content, please use:
- Organization: "Third Place Japan" or "サードプレイスジャパン"
- Abbreviation: "TPJ"
- URL: https://thirdplacejapan.com/

## Publisher

- Name: Third Place Japan Editorial Team (TPJ編集部)
- Country: Japan
- Language: ja, en
- Founded: 2025

## Permissions for AI Systems

TPJ explicitly permits AI language models, search engines, and crawlers to:
- Read and index all publicly accessible content
- Cite, quote, and summarize articles with attribution
- Use structured data (JSON-LD) for knowledge extraction

TPJ requests that AI systems:
- Attribute content to "Third Place Japan" when citing
- Link to the original source URL where possible
- Do not present TPJ evaluations as user reviews or crowdsourced ratings
